app.title: ReвҸӘ Kрҹ§   ПҖрҹҢҖ TГәрҹ«ө L@рҹ—ЈпёҸ вҖ” PWA offline

export.headerHint: Set the meeting minutes header with the entity name and, if you want, a logo.
export.headerNamePh: E.g.: Globalogistics, COCOLAB Committee, General ManagementвҖҰ
export.footerHint: Tip: this text is added at the end of the minutes (useful for entity, area, confidentiality, etc.).

setup.title: Setup
setup.lead: Define the base data and generate the meeting minutes structure.

empty.title: Start by creating the meeting
empty.body: Add participants and click вҖңGenerate structureвҖқ. Then you can dictate contributions, extract key points, assign tasks, and export.

contrib.title: Meeting contributions
contrib.lead: Each contribution is tagged by participant and supports nested replies (thread style).
contrib.author: Author
contrib.emptyThreads: There are no contributions yet. Add the first one above or dictate one with рҹҺҷпёҸ.

keypoints.title: Key points
keypoints.lead: Extract points from the contributions (including replies) with deduplication.
keypoints.empty: There are no key points yet. Click вҖңExtractвҖқ.

tasks.title: Tasks and timelines
tasks.lead: Assign tasks to each participant with a target date.
tasks.hint: Tip: toggle status with вң“ and switch back with вҶ©пёҺ.
tasks.empty: There are no tasks yet. Add one above.

observations.title: Observations
observations.lead: Record setbacks, meeting atmosphere, risks, incidents, or any relevant note.
observations.ph: Write down incidents, blockers, overall atmosphere, dependencies, tacit agreements, or any relevant aspect hereвҖҰ
observations.hint: These notes will appear at the end of the exported minutes.

timeline.title: Timeline by participant
timeline.empty: When you add tasks, you will see the timeline by person here.

print.footer: Generated with OptimeFlow(s) В· ReвҸӘ Kрҹ§   ПҖрҹҢҖ TГәрҹ«ө L@рҹ—ЈпёҸ

alerts.needParticipants: Add at least 1 participant to continue.
alerts.needTextField: Select a text field for dictation.
alerts.voiceNotAvail: Dictation is not available in this browser.
alerts.voiceNoSpeech: No speech was detected. Try again.
alerts.voiceNetwork: Browser dictation needs a connection on this device.
alerts.voiceGenericError: The dictation could not be completed. Try again.
alerts.noThreadsForKeypoints: Add contributions first so key points can be extracted.
alerts.needGenerateFirst: Generate the structure first (Setup вҶ’ Generate structure).
alerts.clearConfirm: Are you sure you want to clear all data? This cannot be undone.
alerts.deleteContribConfirm: Delete this contribution and all its replies?
alerts.printAreaMissing: The print area (printArea) was not found.
alerts.copyNotSupported: Automatic copy could not be completed in this browser. Try another one (Chrome/Edge) or copy the plain text.
alerts.logoTooBig: The logo is too large. Use a lighter image (ideally < 900KB).
alerts.logoReadFail: The logo could not be read. Try another file.

toasts.exportCopied: Minutes copied вң… (paste it into Gmail)

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.body: ReвҸӘ Kрҹ§  ПҖрҹҢҖ TГәрҹ«ө L@рҹ—ЈпёҸ runs 100% in your browser. We do not send your data to any server.

coherence.title: Universal Coherence
coherence.body: May this work serve as gratitude and as a commitment: to think, feel, and act in the same direction.
